title: Material Passport
description: Handoff Schema 9 (cross-stage metadata). Accompanies every artifact as it passes between stages, providing provenance and verification tracking.

origin_skill.description: Which skill produced this artifact (e.g., alterlab-deep-research, alterlab-paper-writer).

origin_mode.description: Which mode was used (e.g., full, socratic, pre-review).

integrity_pass_date.description: Optional. ISO 8601 timestamp of last integrity verification pass (if applicable).

content_hash.description: Optional. SHA-256 hash of the content (for change detection).

upstream_dependencies.description: Optional. Version labels of artifacts this one depends on.
